titleStmt.title: SII 34.360: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 360. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the cross wall of the east prākāra in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: This is a king's communication addressed to the nāṭṭār of the temple villages (kōyil-paṟṟu) that they should pay to the temple itself the sum of 100 poṉ they are paying towards the government tax. The money was to be used for offerings during the service Sundara-pāṇḍyaṉ-sandhi named after the king himself. The king may be the same as the one in No. 363 below].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakravatti kOṉEriṉmai koṇṭāṉ kuṉṟāṇ
ṭār kōyilppaṟṟu nāṭṭāṟku taṅkaḷ nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyiṉār kōyil celutti
mikutiyāka Iṟukkum poṉ nūṟum patiṉ mūṉṟāvatiṉ E
tirāmāṇṭu paṅkuṉimātam mutal Uṭaiyār tirukkuṉ
ṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku nam pērāl kaṭṭiṉa
cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷ
ḷiṭṭapaṭi viñcaṉattukkum Uṭalāka yippoṉ
nūṟum Iṟaiyili Āka coṉṉōm Ippaṭikku variyi
lum kaḻikkaccoṉṉōm cantirātittavarai cella ka
llilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu pūcai tāḻ
vaṟa naṭatti pōtuvatu §
Digital edition of SII 34.360 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
